mapper.insert: insert into shopping_cart(name, image, user_id, dish_id, setmeal_id, dish_flavor, number, amount, create_time) values (#{name}, #{image}, #{userId}, #{dishId}, #{setmealId}, #{dishFlavor}, #{number}, #{amount}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, image, user_id AS userId, dish_id AS dishId, setmeal_id AS setmealId, dish_flavor AS dishFlavor, number, amount, create_time AS createTime FROM shopping_cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: update shopping_cart set number = #{number} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from shopping_cart where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
